MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bradley Voelker is present in pro per.
Defendant Lindsey Davis is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
